title: Databázový developer
description_html:
Pracovní nabídka

Jsme mezinárodní společnost zaměřující se nejen na marketingový výzkum a nové technologie, ale i na trénink a konzultační činnost. Snažíme se být zvídaví, inovativní a neustále usilujeme o nejlepší možná řešení pro naše klienty.

Zaměstnáváme mladé talenty, kterým nabízíme možnost růstu v naší společnosti, a zkušené profesionály, kteří u nás najdou profesionální zázemí. Dáváme možnost každému jedinci vyniknout a zaměřit se na oblast, ve které se cítí nejlépe.

Momentálně hledáme kolegy na pozici:

Databázový developer

Jak bude tvá práce vypadat?

  • Budeš pracovat se stávajícími SQL postupy a úlohami;
  • zapojíš se do udržování již existujících databázových funkcí (pro PostgreSQL), a také do vkládaní a ladění nově přidaných funkcionalit;
  • budeš dohlížet na spouštění aktuálních úloh a řešit případné vzniklé problémy;
  • udržovat stávající Windows aplikace a servisy.

Co od Tebe budeme očekávat?

  • Znalost základních principů relační databáze (RDBMS);
  • přehled o databázové architektuře (ideálně PostgreSQL);
  • znalost SQL a PostgreSQL, zkušenost s geometrickými a prostorovými funkcemi (např. PostGIS pro PostgreSQL nebo Spatial SDO pro Oracle);
  • schopnost vyvíjet databázové funkce či procedury, schopnost organizace programových jednotek (PostgreSQL) nebo balíku procedur (Oracle);
  • zkušenost s vývojovou platformou Microsoft Dot.Net (Microsoft Visual Studio);
  • základní znalost Python, znalost programovacího jazyka C# výhodou;
  • schopnost vyvinout Windows Forms nebo Windows Service aplikace pro práci a manipulaci s databází;
  • angličtina na úrovni B2.

Co Ti můžeme nabídnout?

  • Práci na HPP, IČO v největší výzkumné a technologické agentuře v ČR;
  • možnost podílet se na zajímavých mezinárodních projektech se zahraničními partnery;
  • příležitost osobního i profesního rozvoje;
  • práci v přátelském týmu, který spolu netráví čas jenom v kancelářích, ale také na společných výletech, sportovních akcích nebo u piva po práci;
  • odpovídající finanční ohodnocení a spoustu zaměstnaneckých benefitů jako například home-office, sick days, sebevzdělávání v rámci pracovní doby, kartu Multisport, nápoje a občerstvení na pracovišti a mnoho dalšího;
  • bike friendly kanceláře s možností sprchy a uzamknutí kola;
  • pracoviště v centru Prahy v moderně vybavených kancelářích Slovanského domu;
  • nástup možný ihned.

title: Software Engineer- Frontend Developer
description_html:
Pracovní nabídka

Expect more. Connect more. Be more at Diebold Nixdorf.

HAVE WE MET? NOT YET?

We started by manufacturing safes and vaults, today we are a strategic end-to-end provider of services, software, HW and security. Our teams automate, digitize, and transform the way more than 75 million people around the globe bank and shop.

Diebold Nixdorf is the world's leading manufacturer of ATMs, and our Pilsen office (founded in 2015) specializes exclusively in software development. Thanks to our talented colleagues, our small office has evolved from a small office to the most important fintech company in the Pilsen region in a couple of years. Our vision is to continue to grow and acquire more interesting strategic projects.

We have great news! We are seeking a talented and passionate React.js Developer to join our growing front-end development team. You will be responsible for building modern, responsive web application using React.js and collaborating closely with designers, backend developers, and product managers to deliver high-quality user experiences.

Are you ready to be part of our friendly team? Now you have the chance!

WHAT WILL YOU BE DOING IN OUR SW TEAM?

  • Develop and maintain scalable, high-performance web application using React.js
  • Collaborate with UX/UI designers and backend developers to deliver seamless user experiences
  • Working on the design, implementation, and maintenance in Agile methodology
  • Analyzing software requirements to determine feasible solutions within time and cost constraints
  • Tech stack: JavaScript frameworks (React.js) and libraries (Redux, Material UI), TypeScript, npm/yarn

SKILLS YOU WILL NEED

  • Experience with Frontend development
  • Good understanding of React.js, JavaScript (ES6+) and TypeScript
  • Experience with Redux
  • Knowledge of version control systems (Git)

WILL YOU FIT IN?

  • You have good communication skills and ability to work in a team-oriented environment
  • You are fluent in English language
  • You are able to take responsibility for your decisions

GET TO KNOW OUR TEAM AND HOW WE WORK

We are an open-minded, friendly, straight-forward, and very passionate team! Join the team, where we assure that all we create runs smoothly.

Our projects are delivered to the largest banks across the whole world. We work as a team, so you will always find bunch of friends and colleagues who will help you to solve complex tasks, where SW, infrastructure, DB and other factors are involved.

WHAT DO WE OFFER?

  • Prestige - we implement interesting projects for international clients
  • Stability & perspective - we have been on the market for many years and operate globally
  • Great team - we maintain friendly and helpful relationships, we are not just colleagues
  • Future career - you can become a team leader or specialize in your field
  • Innovation and development - we support individual development and professional training; experienced colleagues are also happy to pass on their experience
  • Remuneration - in addition to fair wages, we have annual bonuses according to the company results
  • Flexibility - we accommodate parents and support work-life balance
  • Public transport - we will reimburse you for a yearly voucher for public transport in Pilsen (in case you do not have an allocated parking space)
  • Time off - 5 weeks holiday + 4 sick days + bridge days (paid leave for public holidays that fall on a weekend in a given calendar year)
  • Equipment - of course you get a laptop and phone including unlimited tariff and up to 10 GB of data
  • Cafeteria - you choose your own benefits; we will give you 15 000 CZK per year to your Pluxee card
  • Meal vouchers - for lunches you will have 200 CZK / day on Pluxee card
  • MultiSport - we support the physical and mental health of our colleagues
  • The future – we contribute to your pension insurance
  • Allowance for working from home - we contribute 705 CZK gross per month
  • Good thing - we have 2 days of paid time off for charity activities
  • Special discount on tariffs - special discounts on tariffs for up to 5 numbers with T-Mobile
  • Advantages - you can take advantage of benefits like the Makro card, Datart VIP program and Alza benefit

Our success is never a job for one person! We look forward to you joining our team. Don't miss the opportunity to become one of us!

MORE ABOUT US

We have 23 000+ great colleagues in 130+ countries around the world creating technologies of the future, together.

Supportive company culture combined with internal training and technological facilities creates ideal conditions for professional development of each employee, meaningful and responsible work focused on the daily needs of our customers and, last but not least, opportunity to balance personal and professional life.

*Diebold Nixdorf is an equal opportunity employer, and we value diversity at our company. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity, age, marital status, veteran status, or disability status. *

** To all recruitment agencies: Diebold Nixdorf does not accept agency resumes. Please do not forward resumes to our jobs alias, Diebold Nixdorf employees or any other organization location. Diebold Nixdorf is not responsible for any fees related to unsolicited resumes. **

We are a global company operating in multiple locations and entities. As we are keen to find the best solution for our candidates several legal entities might be applicable for a Job offer. A List of our operating entities can be found here - https://www.dieboldnixdorf.com/en-us/about-us/global-locations

description_html:

title: Systémový tester
description_html:
Pracovní nabídka

Baví vás technologie a auta? Chcete testovat nové funkce přímo v moderních vozech Škoda a ne pouze u počítače?
Do našeho týmu hledáme posilu do týmu, která se bude podílet testování vozidel dle předdefinovaných testovacích scénářů a účastnit se testovacích jízd v rámci ČR i zahraničí.

Náplň práce

  • Manuální testování přímo ve vozech - testovací jízdy v ČR i zahraničí. Ověřování funkcionalit v reálném provozu.
  • Testování v terénu i kanceláři. Práce s testovacími scénáři.
  • Hledání chyb v nestandardních situacích.
  • Zadávání, správa a ověřování oprav chyb v nástroji JIRA.
  • Spolupráce v týmu - komunikace s Feature Ownery a garanty, pravidelný reporting, účast na týmových meetingách.

Co byste měli mít

  • SŠ/VŠ technického směru (elektro, IT, telekomunikace nebo automotive).
  • Řidičský průkaz skupiny B – aktivní řidič.
  • Mít povědomí nebo zkušenost s testováním v automotive.
  • Znalost JIRA (nebo podobného nástroje) a pokročilejší práce v Excelu.
  • Komunikativní angličtina nebo němčina (čtení dokumentace, zadávání chyb).
  • Technické a analytické myšlení. Nebát se hledat příčiny problémů.
  • Ochota cestovat po ČR i zahraničí.

Požadované znalosti (alespoň základní zkušenost)

  • Práce s chybami (bug tracking).
  • Práce s koncernovými systémy - ODIS, Serial2, KPM, JIRA, Street Worker.
  • Výhodou je zkušenost s manuálním testováním infotainmentu nebo konektivity a znalost diagnostických nástrojů VW Group.
  • Výhodou je pokud máte certifikaci ISTQB Foundation.

Co vám můžeme nabídnout

  • Práce onsite 5 dní v týdnu v Mladé Boleslavi.
  • Pracovní zázemí v prostorách vývojového centra Škoda Auta.
  • Práci na moderních technologiích v oblasti digitálních služeb pro automotive.
  • Stabilní zázemí, dlouhodobou spolupráci a přátelský kolektiv.
  • Zajímavé firemní benefity.

(NAB-1656)

title: Tester řídicích systémů zemědělských strojů
description_html:
Pracovní nabídka

Chcete být u vývoje technologií, které každý den mění způsob, jakým se pracuje na poli? V BEDNAR FMT s.r.o. hledáme kolegu, který se nebojí technických výzev, má cit pro detail a rád vidí výsledky své práce přímo v akci na moderních zemědělských strojích.

Co vás čeká

• Úzce spolupracovat s týmem programátorů při vývoji řídicího systému.
• Testování elektronických řídicích systémů zemědělských strojů.
• Testování uživatelského rozhraní.
• Testování funkčnosti hardware systému – vstupy/výstupy/motory/hydraulické ventily apod..
• Spolupráce na vytváření dokumentace a manuálů.
• Školení pracovníků Produkt managementu a Firemní zkušebny pro práci s nově vyvinutým řídicím systémem. • Práce částečně v kanceláři, ve výrobní hale a částečně v terénu na poli.

Jaké znalosti a dovednosti byste měli mít

• Ukončené SŠ vzdělání se zaměřením na automatizační technologie / elektro / technický směr.
• Analytické myšlení.
• Znalost angličtiny tak, abyste byl/a schopen číst technické manuály.

Výhodou bude

• Znalost prvků automatizačních technologií.
• Zkušenosti se sběrnicí CAN.
• Znalost protokolů CanOpen, ISOBUS, SAE J1939.
• Znalost základů programování.

Co vám můžeme nabídnout

U nás budete mít možnost vidět, jak vaše práce ovlivňuje reálné stroje, reálné zákazníky a reálné výsledky. Hledáme někoho, kdo s námi chce budovat budoucnost precizního zemědělství.

• Zajímavou a dobře ohodnocenou práci, ve které se nebudete nudit

title: Statistik/Statistička - Analytik/Analytička – vhodné i pro absolventy
company_name: Oblastní nemocnice Mladá Boleslav, a.s., nemocnice Středočeského kraje
description_html:
Pracovní nabídka

Co vás čeká

Popište za co budou noví kolegové zodpovědní, jejich pozici v týmu a úkoly, které budou nejčastěji řešit. Čím konkrétnější budete, tím vyšší je šance, že se přihlásí ten pravý člověk.

Staňte se klíčovou součástí našeho týmu v nemocnici!

Hledáme motivovaného a analyticky zaměřeného člověka na pozici Statistik / Statistička – Analytik / Analytička. Pokud máte hlavu plnou nápadů, baví Vás práce s čísly a daty a chcete se podílet na efektivním chodu nemocnice, pak hledáme právě Vás! Tato pozice je skvělou příležitostí i pro šikovné absolventy VŠ s chutí učit se nové věci.

Co bude Vaší náplní práce?

  • Práce s obrovským objemem dat – jejich sběr, zpracování, analýza a interpretace.
  • Správa modulu nemocničního informačního systému (NIS) zaměřeného na výkaznictví a statistiky.
  • Zpracování a kontrola datových dávek pro zdravotní pojišťovny a další plátce péče.
  • Tvorba povinných statistik pro ÚZIS (Ústav zdravotnických informací a statistiky ČR).
  • Spolupráce s finanční účtárnou, zejména při podpoře fakturace.
  • Tvorba ad hoc analýz, reportů a statistik pro potřeby vedení nemocnice a jednotlivých klinik.
  • Spolupráce s klinikami – podpora a edukace lékařů i sester v oblasti správného vykazování zdravotních výkonů, léků a materiálu.
  • Orientace a aplikace znalostí z úhradové vyhlášky a seznamu zdravotních výkonů v praxi.
  • Postupné zapojení do problematiky systému DRG (Diagnosis Related Groups).
  • Hledání možností a zapojení nástrojů umělé inteligence (AI) pro zefektivnění analýz a procesů.

Co od Vás očekáváme?

  • Vynikající analytické myšlení – schopnost vidět souvislosti v datech je pro nás klíčová!
  • Velmi pokročilou znalost MS Excel (kontingenční tabulky, funkce, grafy, analýza dat).
  • Samostatnost v rozhodování a proaktivní přístup k řešení úkolů.
  • VŠ vzdělání (ideálně ekonomického směru) nebo prokazatelnou praxi ve zdravotnictví s analytickým přesahem.
  • Ochotu a schopnost rychle se učit – specifika zdravotnictví Vás naučíme! (NIS, výkaznictví, úhradová vyhláška, DRG...).
  • Pečlivost, zodpovědnost a smysl pro detail.
  • Schopnost efektivně pracovat s velkým objemem dat.
  • Zájem o oblast zdravotnictví a datové analýzy.
  • Základní povědomí nebo zájem o možnosti využití AI výhodou.

Co Vám můžeme nabídnout?

  • Zajímavou a zodpovědnou práci ve stabilním prostředí moderní nemocnice.
  • Možnost stát se expertem v unikátní oblasti zdravotnických dat a výkaznictví.
  • Prostor pro vlastní iniciativu a samostatné řešení úkolů.
  • Důkladné zaškolení pod vedením zkušených kolegů.
  • Podporu dalšího vzdělávání a profesního růstu.
  • Možnost podílet se na smysluplné práci, která má reálný dopad.
  • Standardní zaměstnanecké benefity 5 týdnů dovolené a 3 dny zdravotního volna,
    dotované parkování v parkovacím domě v areálu nemocnice, dotované stravování v zaměstnanecké jídelně, dětskou skupinu Veselé Žabičky, benefitní kartu Můj UP (příspěvky na rekreaci, sportovní aktivity, nákupy…), Multisport kartu, podporu fyzické i psychické pohody zaměstnanců v Centru péče o zaměstnance, příspěvek na penzijní pojištění a další finanční benefity dle kolektivní smlouvy atp.

Zaujala Vás tato výzva?

I když nemáte přímé zkušenosti ze zdravotnictví, ale máte skvělé analytické myšlení, excelujete v Excelu a máte chuť se učit, ozvěte se nám! Odbornost Vás naučíme.

title: Client Solutions Consultant
description_html:
This role is part of Aon Impact Forecasting team, a team of scientists, developers and client services colleagues together developing and supporting catastrophe models for various perils including flood, windstorm, earthquake, wildfire or terrorism.

What The Day Will Look Like

  • Using our loss-forecasting models to deliver insights for clients
  • Developing solutions and tools that improve user experience and enhance data processing capabilities
  • Providing guidance on catastrophe modelling software both internally (across Aon offices) and externally (for Aon clients)
  • Offering software advisory support, including troubleshooting, data preparation and interpretation of results
  • Advising on procedures for the development, validation and implementation of new models
  • Closely collaborating with other Impact Forecasting teams, with potential involvement in catastrophe model development, programming, account management etc.
  • Maintaining frequent communication with internal stakeholders and external clients

To put it briefly and simply, we are looking for a technical person with a curious, analytical mind.

Skills And Experience That Will Lead To Success

  • Completed high school studies with leaving exam
  • Advanced knowledge of some of the following technologies: SQL, Python, VBA, Excel, LLMs, QGIS
  • Knowledge of MS Office – especially Excel
  • Strong communication skills in English – both written and spoken
  • Strong analytical thinking, attention to detail and overall computing skills
  • Ability to perform tasks independently but also to collaborate, explain, present and communicate effectively concepts and solutions to clients and colleagues
  • Willingness to learn, creativity, and a curiosity about innovation

What We Offer

  • Engaging and diverse role in a dynamic and exciting team, where you can gain highly focused expertise, with continuous and ongoing international training programme and potential for travelling.
  • Being a part of Aon means having opportunities, working in a driven, encouraging, and friendly environment. We value integrity, authenticity, and a can-do approach.
  • Working at Aon brings you an opportunity to work for a global leader in the highly attractive reinsurance industry with regional headquarter in Prague, while engaging with people all over the world.
  • We offer flexible working and an attractive compensation package that includes pension scheme contributions, in-office massages, language courses, ergonomic tables, sick days, and many more.
  • We have modern offices in the very centre of Prague, but we also offer flexible working hours and home office.
  • Aon values an innovative, diverse workplace where all colleagues feel empowered to be their authentic selves. Aon is proud to be an equal opportunity employer.

Please note applications are available for candidates with valid work permit in Czechia.

How We Support Our Colleagues

In addition to our comprehensive benefits package, we encourage an inclusive workforce. Plus, our agile environment allows you to manage your wellbeing and work/life balance, ensuring you can be your best self at Aon. Furthermore, all colleagues enjoy two “Global Wellbeing Days” each year, encouraging you to take time to focus on yourself. We offer a variety of working style solutions for our colleagues as well.

Our continuous learning culture inspires and equips you to learn, share and grow, helping you achieve your fullest potential. As a result, at Aon, you are more connected, more relevant, and more valued.

Aon values an innovative and inclusive workplace where all colleagues feel empowered to be their authentic selves. Aon is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace.

Aon provides equal employment opportunities to all employees and applicants for employment without regard to race, color, religion, creed, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, age, disability, veteran, marital, domestic partner status, or other legally protected status.

We are committed to providing equal employment opportunities and fostering an inclusive workplace. If you require accommodations during the application or interview process, please let us know. You can request accommodations by emailing us at ReasonableAccommodations@Aon.com or your recruiter. We will work with you to meet your needs and ensure a fair and equitable experience.

V NDS vieme, že spokojní zamestnanci sú základom úspechu. Preto vám ponúkame nielen stabilné pracovné prostredie, ale aj množstvo výhod, ktoré podporia váš profesionálny aj osobný rozvoj. Od finančných benefitov, až po starostlivosť o vašu pohodu – u nás nájdete viac než len prácu. Pozrite sa, čo všetko vás u nás čaká! ⬇️

  • Finančná odmena pri pracovných výročiach – vážime si vernosť a lojalitu,
  • Prispievame našim kolegom na ročnú diaľničnú známku v hodnote 70€,
  • Odmeňujeme darcov krvi až do výšky 80€ ročne,

  • Myslíme sociálne, v nepriaznivých životných situáciách podávame pomocnú ruku,
  • Ak zostanete PN, finančne vás podporíme,
  • U nás môžete rásť, organizujeme rôzne kurzy a školenia,
  • Sme „Zdravá firma“, zdravie je pre nás na 1. mieste a pre našich kolegov ponúkame množstvo aktivít zameraných na posilnenie zdravia,
  • Možnosť využívať vlastné rekreačné zariadenie pre zamestnancov a rodinných príslušníkov v Liptovskom Jáne za zvýhodnené ceny,

Oslovila Vás naša ponuka? Dajte nám o sebe čo najskôr vedieť prostredníctvom svojho životopisu. Motivačný alebo sprievodný list poteší, radi sa o Vás dozvieme čo najviac. Preto, ak Vás v budúcnosti u nás zaujme iná ponuka, určite neváhajte poslať žiadosť opätovne. My sa jej vždy budeme dôkladne venovať.

title: Embedded Software Developer OPC UA
description_html:
V našem R&D centru Siemens Foundational Technologies se zabýváme vývojem produktů (vývoj software, hardware, mechanickou konstrukcí a jejich testování) pro koncept nové generace systémů v rámci Průmyslu 4.0 . Zakládáme si na vysoké odbornosti, pečlivém přístupu a týmové práci. Podporujeme osobní rozvoj a umožňujeme realizovat vaše nápady.

Chceš se podílet na vývoji zařízení splňující požadavky průmyslu zítřka? Máš zájem o nové cloudové technologie, nejmodernější komunikační technologie v automatizaci a vývoj konzistentních a bezpečných komunikačních řešení od úrovně řízené technologie až po cloud? Potom je pro tebe vývoj OPC UA (otevřený mezinárodní standart IEC62541) v našich PLC řady SIMATIC tou správnou volbou!

Staň se součástí profesionálního a dynamicky se rozvíjejícího kolektivu, který má při práci ten nejlepší výhled na Plzeň. Nabízíme ti možnost ukázat svoje schopnosti a dovednosti při dalším vývoji OPC UA v produktech průmyslové automatizace světové jedničky.

Připoj se k nám a rozvíjej inovativní technologie.

Budeš se věnovat:

  • Implementaci OPC UA do firmwaru PLC z řady S7-1500
  • Tvorbě zdrojového kódu v jazyce C/C++ pro embedded platformy
  • Vývoji v prostředí s RTOS a požadavky na real time odezvu systému
  • Integrace komunikačních stacku pro průmyslovou automatizaci (PROF

Co očekáváme:

  • VŠ vzdělání technického směru, případně adekvátní praxi v oboru
  • Výbornou znalost programovacího jazyka C/C++
  • Znalost Aj – denní komunikace, znalost Nj – výhodou
  • Orientaci v embedded programování
  • Výhodou znalost OPC UA, síťových technologií (Profinet, Ethernet, TCP/IP, IPv6)
  • Výhodou znalost Google test a Pythonu
  • Výhodou znalost a praktické zkušenosti s procesy vývoje software

Co u nás získáš?

Více času na odpočinek

  • Až 33 dní volna (5 týdnů dovolené + až 8 dní z benefitního rozpočtu).
  • Možnost neplaceného volna pro odpočinek nebo cestování.

Individuální rozpočet benefity

  • Individuální rozpočet ve výši 34 000 Kč na nákup vybraných benefitů z oblastí finance, pohoda a zdraví.

Moje finance

  • Příspěvek na penzijní a/nebo životní pojištění a/nebo DIP (dlouhodobý investiční produkt) z benefitního rozpočtu.
  • Zaměstnanecký akciový program – podílejte se na úspěchu firmy.

Moje pohoda

  • Systém Cafeterie z benefitního rozpočtu.
  • E-stravenky
  • Firemní školka v Praze a Ostravě pro podporu rodičů.
  • Zvýhodněné nabídky pro zaměstnance.

Moje zdraví

  • Výhodná MultiSport karta.
  • Možnost nadstandardní zdravotní péče a krizová podpora (např. psycholog).

Společnost Siemens je zaměstnavatelem podporujícím rovné příležitosti. Zasazujeme se o rovné pracovní příležitosti bez ohledu na rasu, barvu pleti, původ, náboženství, pohlaví, sexuální orientaci, věk, občanství, rodinný stav, zdravotní postižení nebo genderovou identitu. Jsme odhodláni vytvořit tým, který bude reprezentovat nejrůznější prostředí, perspektivy a dovednosti. Objevte náš zajímavý svět Siemens na www.siemens.com

title: ROM Software Test Engineer
description_html:
At NXP Semiconductors, we shape a smarter, more secure world.

NXP Semiconductors enables secure connections and infrastructure for a smarter world, advancing solutions that make lives easier, better, and safer. As a global leader in secure connectivity solutions for embedded applications, we are driving innovations in secure connected vehicles, end-to-end security & privacy, and smart connected solutions markets. Built on more than 60 years of combined experience and expertise with the energy of more than 33,000 talented employees across 30+ countries.

Ready to help create the future of innovation?

We are looking for curious, creative and passionate engineers to join our software team. You will work on advanced software components for smart homes and cities, future industry facilities and communication technologies. Here your ideas can truly make an impact – NXP is committed to continuous innovation, professional growth, and fostering supportive team culture. With software innovations becoming a driver, our engineers are at the heart of shaping what comes next.

If you’re passionate about embedded systems, low level programming, or software testing, you might be exactly who we’re looking for. Join our R&D teams in Rožnov or Brno and help us build the technologies of the future...

Curious?

As Software Test Engineer in the Edge Enablement SW team, you will play a key role in designing, developing, verifying and validating cutting-edge embedded software solutions that meet highest security standards. Your work will directly influence the reliability and safety and security of advanced industrial and embedded systems.

Your Responsibilities

  • Run verification of high‑quality software including on chip ROM code functionality
  • Drive seamless collaboration across diverse global teams, shaping effective communication and fostering a truly international working environment
  • Opportunity to take on a key technical leadership role, guiding a validation team and influencing the quality and direction of product development
  • Automate testing for embedded software and help shape modern testing workflows
  • Contribute to the creation of new, innovative professional software products
  • Participate in the design and architecture of testing tools and validation apps
  • Support requirements specification for future software features
  • Develop and maintain test scripts on state‑of‑the‑art microcontrollers and microprocessors
  • Follow established software development processes and quality standards, participate on their improvements to ensure excellence

Your team

By joining our Czech development hubs, you’ll become part of a high‑performing, enthusiastic software team working in a friendly, collaborative, and rapidly evolving environment.

You’ll have opportunities to work with various NXP teams worldwide, explore new technologies, share your insights, and shape solutions that truly matter.

Your profile

To Thrive In This Role, You Bring

  • A solid understanding of embedded systems and microcontroller/microprocessor architecture
  • Experience in low level asm, C programming; Python (or other languages) for programming and scripting
  • Solid debugging skills for embedded targets and low-level software
  • Advantage: practical experience in ROM code development or testing
  • Familiarity with test automation, continuous integration and modern development workflows
  • Experience in technical team leadership
  • A proactive, pragmatic mindset and ability to work independently
  • Eagerness to learn and explore new technology trends
  • A collaborative spirit and openness to knowledge sharing
  • Advantage: experience with DevOps tools such as Jenkins, Bamboo, Docker
  • Good English communication skills (B2 or higher)

Ready to help build a smarter world? Visit our career website and connect with us on LinkedIn, Facebook and Twitter.

What Can You Expect

Contract: A full‑time role with a permanent contract, offering long‑term stability and room to grow.

Compensation & Benefits: Attractive market salary is accompanied by the bonus plan (payment twice a year), long-term incentive plan and dividends processing, opportunity to purchase company shares at a 15% discount, lunch allowance, additional vacation days, sickness support, sick days, weekend bank holiday recovery days, pension and well-being support, flexible work hours, home office, team-buildings, and much more. Salaries are reviewed annually, and market trends are closely observed.

We believe in providing a holistic and supportive work environment, and we would be happy to share more details during our face-to-face discussions.

Development growth: We believe our success is built on the growth of our people. At NXP, you’ll have access to a rich mix of online and in‑person learning opportunities to strengthen both your technical abilities and your core professional skills. Whether you want to deepen your expertise or broaden your career path, we’re here to support you.

Our offices: We keep our workspaces comfortable and practical:

  • Brno – A modern, newly built office with an on‑site cafeteria.
  • Rožnov pod Radhoštěm – A place with history and character, carefully reconstructed for modern needs set in a beautiful mountain environment and relaxing town atmosphere.

Both locations offer a friendly environment supported by dedicated facility specialists who make sure everything runs smoothly.

Our Hiring process: Applying is quick and simple – just submit your CV through our online form.

If your profile matches, you’ll first have a short phone or video call. The next step is an in‑person meeting with our technical team. We move fast and keep communication straightforward throughout the process.

And what makes life with NXP special: Life here goes beyond work. Whether it's starting the morning with a free coffee, enjoying fruit days, ice‑cream afternoons, or joining one of our bake fairs, we care about creating a pleasant atmosphere. We support great team‑building activities and regularly host social events like Christmas parties, family days, and food fairs.

If giving back is important to you, you can join our charity initiatives and help support the community.

What’s Next

If you’re excited about this opportunity, we kindly invite you to apply!

More information about NXP in Czech Republic...

title: Professional Services Consultant
description_html:
At Quadient, we support businesses of all sizes in their digital transformation and growth journey, unlocking operational efficiency with reliable, secure, and sustainable automation processes. Our success in delivering innovation and business growth is inspired by the connections our diverse teams create every day, with our clients and each other. It’s these connections that make Quadient such an exceptional place to grow your career, develop your skills and make a real impact – help our future-focused business lead the way in powering secure and sustainable business connections through digital and physical channels.

Job Description

You will be part of our professional services team, and you’ll be dedicated to the success of customers’ experience strategies and their implementations. With your team members you will ensure that customers successfully implement Quadient solutions.

  • Implementation of CXM software solutions
  • Installation and configuration of Quadient applications
  • Analysis of requirements and solution design
  • Implementation tasks spanning from GUI configuration to light weight programming
  • Technical project leadership

Qualifications

  • English (minimum B2) both written and spoken, German is a plus.
  • Good grasp of IT technologies, the ability to quickly find missing information / knowledge.
  • Ability to write short scripts in any language (e.g. JavaScript, Groovy, Shell, Ansible).
  • The desire to learn new things and solve problems.
  • Analytical thinking.
  • Willingness to travel might be required, but traveling is not guaranteed.

Knowledge gaps can be filled. Even if you don’t satisfy every single requirement or meet every qualification listed, we still want to hear from you.

Additional Information

Rewards & Benefits

  • Flexible Work: Embrace a hybrid work model blending office and remote setup for a balanced lifestyle.
  • Endless Learning: Access global opportunities for growth through our 24/7 online learning platform.
  • Inclusive Community: Join our Empowered Communities and engage in our Philanthropy program.
  • Comprehensive Rewards: Enjoy competitive Total Rewards covering wellness, work/life balance, and more, including a generous referral scheme.
  • Caring for Wellbeing: Access our complimentary employee assistance program for mental health support.

Smart Work at Quadient

At Quadient, our Smart Work approach fosters connection, collaboration, and innovation while offering flexibility based on role requirements. Whether on-site, hybrid, or remote, our work environments are designed to support productivity and engagement. Hybrid employees balance remote and in-office work, on-site roles contribute daily to our vibrant workplace culture, and remote employees stay connected through virtual collaboration and in-person events. No matter where you work, you’ll be part of a dynamic, people-first community that drives success together.

Be yourself at Quadient

Our values define how we work as a team: Empowerment, Passion, Inspiration and Community. They inspire us to be EPIC. Together. What makes Quadient different is how different we are. We’re a team of individuals with one goal but many perspectives. When you connect with Quadient, you become part of a community that cares - in a culture that embraces differences and values every voice.

We will consider any reasonable modifications to the interview process. If you require any assistance with the application process, please email us at career@quadient.com

Quadient is an Equal Employment Opportunity Employer. *: We firmly believe in zero discrimination in employment on any basis, including race, color, religion, sex, national origin, age, disability, veteran or military status, genetic information, citizenship status, and any other characteristics protected by local, state, or federal law.

People. Connected.

title: ML Researcher Intern - Prague - Czechia
description_html:
Please note this posting is to advertise potential job opportunities. This exact role may not be open today but could open in the near future. When you apply, a Cisco representative may contact you directly if a relevant position opens.

Application Deadline: March 31 2026

Location: PRG5 office

Hybrid

20 hours per week

Who You’ll Work With

We are a bunch of former security startups collectively called Threat Detection and Response. We keep an agile, fun, and passionate upstart culture within Cisco. You will work in an international environment in downtown Prague, Czech Republic, closely cooperating with teams in the US. We balance collaboration and integration with autonomy and innovation to deliver the most effective solution to our customers’ problems. The unique mix of our disruptive approach to security and Cisco’s industry dominance surpasses what any other security startup could ever achieve on its own.

Your Impact

We are seeking a motivated Machine Learning Researcher or Machine Learning Engineer Intern to join our team. The ideal candidate will have a solid foundation in machine learning concepts and a passion for applying their skills to real-world problems. This internship offers a unique opportunity to gain hands-on experience, contribute to exciting projects, and work alongside experienced researchers and engineers.

Possible Projects You Could Work On

Identifying Threats in E-mail Cybersecurity Data – E-mail has been one of the primary attack vectors for years, both within personal and business field. Identifying phishing and other malicious abuse within e-mail communication is thus of big interest. Now, with the surge of LLMs, the threat detection is even more challenging as the attackers are using all the available tools to pretend their e-mails being as legitimate as possible. We are looking for interns that would participate in our threat detection ML research and ML Engineering – within text processing and LLMs, structured data processing, data science work and more traditional ML research, and the results should end up in our E-mail threat detection product.

One possible, more specific, topic might be exploration of deeper structural cues hidden in modern HTML-based e‑mails. By modelling the HTML structure, for example as a graph, we can capture patterns that help reveal sophisticated or obfuscated malicious behavior. Further internship topics might cover other types of additional context for the detection system that would serve for identifying new deceptive techniques.

Incident Similarity – the breach protection systems generate a wide variety of detection events, which are aggregated into incidents. These incidents, containing diverse information ranging from textual descriptions to numerical data, are then managed by security operations teams to safeguard organizational assets. This example project focuses on researching similarity measures that can identify incidents with similar information, meaning, and impact on the system, thereby enhancing incident correlation and response effectiveness.

LLM Features Enhancement - the goal is to advance the capabilities of large language models (LLMs) used in incident summarization and contextualization within security operations. This work involves tasks such as prompt engineering to design effective instructions that guide the LLMs, evaluating model performance, measuring output quality, and developing features that generate inputs for prompts. The goal is to improve how incidents are summarized and understood by leveraging LLMs, thereby enhancing the accuracy and relevance of contextual information provided to security teams. This project represents the kind of innovative AI-driven work that supports automated, intelligent incident analysis and decision-making processes.

What You Will Do

  • Assist in inventing, designing, developing, and evaluating innovative models on large-scale data.
    • Support the design and implementation of scalable, efficient, automated Machine Learning pipelines.
    • Contribute to innovation projects from idea to implementation under guidance.
    • Collaborate closely with teams of software, AI and ML engineers
    • Be eager to learn about cybersecurity data analytics and related tools.
    • Help communicate results through internal reports, blogs, and assist in preparing for scientific papers and conference presentations.

    Minimum Requirements

    • Currently pursuing a degree in Computer Science, Data Science, Machine learning, or a related field
    • Proficient in English

    Preferred Requirements

    • Basic understanding or coursework in software engineering is a plus.
    • Experience with coursework in one or more of the following Machine Learning fields: supervised, semi-supervised, or unsupervised learning, explainability of models, advanced statistics, graph theory, game theory.
    • Strong logical reasoning and problem-solving skills.
    • Enthusiasm for completing tasks and making projects successful.
    • Hands on experience with any of the technologies such as scikit-learn, Pandas, PyTorch, LLMs, text embeddings, (py)Spark will boost the start

    Why Cisco?

    At Cisco, we’re revolutionizing how data and infrastructure connect and protect organizations in the AI era – and beyond. We’ve been innovating fearlessly for 40 years to create solutions that power how humans and technology work together across the physical and digital worlds. These solutions provide customers with unparalleled security, visibility, and insights across the entire digital footprint.

    Fueled by the depth and breadth of our technology, we experiment and create meaningful solutions. Add to that our worldwide network of doers and experts, and you’ll see that the opportunities to grow and build are limitless. We work as a team, collaborating with empathy to make really big things happen on a global scale. Because our solutions are everywhere, our impact is everywhere.

    We are Cisco, and our power starts with you.

title: GV Assoc Application Services Specialist
description_html:
Junior SAP Consultant

At ADP, the world’s largest payroll services provider, we are looking for talented Junior SAP Consultants who are interested in starting a long-term career within the field of SAP Consultancy. By joining our SAP Consultant Academy, you will gain the knowledge and know-how required to work as a proficient SAP Consultant for our multinational clients. But that’s just the beginning of your journey. Our SAP Consultants continuously learn, enhance their very unique skill set every day, to become true experts in their field. Come and join us to start your career journey as an SAP Consultant with ADP in Prague.

Your Role

After completing our SAP Consultant Academy, you will be able to:

  • Work with our multinational clients on SAP customization and implementations based on our client’s requests
  • Implement SAP solutions and contribute to their testing
  • Work with our clients on legal updates provided by SAP and help them understand these legal changes
  • Analyse SAP performance errors and provide solutions to our clients
  • Work with our clients on system setup, SAP functionality and SAP enhancements in the complex area of payroll, time management and HR
  • Understand the client’s processes and payroll related systems as well as their relationship to ADP's products and services
  • Effectively collaborate with the payroll teams, making sure the payroll process runs smoothly and according to our client’s expectations.

Who We Are Looking For

  • Passionate about building a long-term career within SAP Consultancy – Our successful consultants choose to stay with us
  • Proficient command of the English language – Our Academy is being held in English
  • Experience in any IT related field with aptitude for solving technical issues is an advantage
  • Analytical mindset with a strong commitment to accuracy
  • Ability to analyse and resolve problems by working with our clients and other teams
  • Previous experience with SAP (HR modules) is considered a plus, but not a requirement
  • Be curious – While our academy is instructor lead and sufficient support is provided, the nature of this role is ideal for people with a drive and appetite for more knowledge
  • Communication skills – Communicate clearly and accurately with other departments and clients

WE OFFER

  • Professional training within the field of SAP Consultancy
  • Long-term career and growth prospects within a truly global organization
  • Friendly international environment in a modern office in the beautiful Karlin district of Prague
  • Hybrid work model – 3 days in the office, 2 days home office per week
  • Become a part of one of the Czech Republic’s Top Employers
  • Competitive salary and an annual bonus
  • 5 weeks of vacation per year
  • Pension plan
  • Leisure time benefits (variety company discounts, e.g. MultiSport Benefit Card)
  • Meal vouchers, Free beverages
  • Engagement activities

A little about ADP: We are a comprehensive global provider of cloud-based human capital management (HCM) solutions that unite HR, payroll, talent, time, tax and benefits administration and a leader in business outsourcing services, analytics, and compliance expertise. We believe our people make all the difference in cultivating a down-to-earth culture that embraces our core values, welcomes ideas, encourages innovation, and values belonging. We've received recognition for our work by many esteemed organizations, learn more at ADP Awards and Recognition.

Diversity, Equity, Inclusion & Equal Employment Opportunity at ADP: ADP is committed to an inclusive, diverse and equitable workplace, and is further committed to providing equal employment opportunities regardless of any protected characteristic including: race, color, genetic information, creed, national origin, religion, sex, affectional or sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, lawful alien status, ancestry, age, marital status, protected veteran status or disability. Hiring decisions are based upon ADP’s operating needs, and applicant merit including, but not limited to, qualifications, experience, ability, availability, cooperation, and job performance.

Ethics at ADP: ADP has a long, proud history of conducting business with the highest ethical standards and full compliance with all applicable laws. We also expect our people to uphold our values with the highest level of integrity and behave in a manner that fosters an honest and respectful workplace. Click https://jobs.adp.com/life-at-adp/ to learn more about ADP’s culture and our full set of values.

title: Junior Tester
description_html:
We are looking for Junior Tester to strengthen current project team. The project is delivering Fraud Detection solution for our customers, big financial companies. Majority of the team is located in Prague, Czech Republic.

The platform builds on micro-services architecture and asynchronous communication patterns and is meant to be highly scalable and robust while utilizing open-source technology stack.

Your future duties and responsibilities

Test new functionalities for our growing solution

Ensure quality by regression testing

Responsible for deliveries within integration team according to the project plan

Close cooperation with Project Manager and Solution Architect and other Team Leaders

Collaborate effectively with various departments, teams and staff across the organization

Context-driven testing

Thoroughness is important, but repeatedly executing the same prepared steps in the same way is not enough. To uncover key information about the software, we ask about its purpose, business logic, situational as well as broader context — and based on that, we choose the most relevant and effective testing approach (from the many possible in complex systems). We then present and defend the resulting approach to the team and the client. Where effective, we leverage automation and AI agents.

Required Qualifications To Be Successful In This Role

Essential Qualifications:

Basic experience with software testing

Tester mindset – curiosity, ability to perform exploratory testing, attention to detail as well as the big picture

Critical thinking and an interest in understanding the broader context

Interest in IT and general awareness of IT topics

Effective communication with others

English at B2+ level

It would be an advantage to have:

Experience in a similar position

Experience with HTML, databases, SQL and API formats testing

Experience in the financial sector

Experience with Atlassian Jira

What we offer:

  • Share Purchase Plan
  • CGI’s My Assistance Program
  • Compensation for long term sickness up to 30 days
  • Interest-free company loan
  • Referral bonus
  • Lunch vouchers – 140CZK
  • Group life insurance
  • Flu and tick vaccination
  • MultiSport card
  • Cafeteria Benefit System – 900CZK monthly
  • Hybrid Working Model & Flexible working hours
  • 5 weeks of vacation + 3 sick days
  • Birthday Leave and CSR day

And many more…

Together, as owners, let’s turn meaningful insights into action.

Life at CGI is rooted in ownership, teamwork, respect and belonging. Here, you’ll reach your full potential because…

You are invited to be an owner from day 1 as we work together to bring our Dream to life. That’s why we call ourselves CGI Partners rather than employees. We benefit from our collective success and actively shape our company’s strategy and direction.

Your work creates value. You’ll develop innovative solutions and build relationships with teammates and clients while accessing global capabilities to scale your ideas, embrace new opportunities, and benefit from expansive industry and technology expertise.

You’ll shape your career by joining a company built to grow and last. You’ll be supported by leaders who care about your health and well-being and provide you with opportunities to deepen your skills and broaden your horizons.

Come join our team—one of the largest IT and business consulting services firms in the world.

title: QA Engineer
description_html:
Are you a technology fan and impressed by aircrafts and ships or are you fascinated by nature and agriculture? Do you want to be part of the energy transition to renewables, or do you see yourself as the cyber guardian? If your response is yes, continue to read our job offer. We are working on all these products and are growing our team!

About The Role

You will drive quality assurance of our tools and platforms. You have an entrepreneurial spirit with a pragmatic, hands-on mindset focused on achieving progress as well as an open-minded, intellectually curious approach to everything you do.

Your Responsibilities Will Be

  • Set up and/or coordinate testing activities
  • Create detailed, comprehensive test plans and test cases
  • Creating and maintaining tests for the application
  • Configuring and making sure the automated tests are running properly
  • Clarifying and discussing with the BA and PO what needs to be tested

About The Team

If tackling complex challenges in a wide range of industries excites you, then join our innovative team, where you are at the forefront of creating new ingenious solutions in a collaborative way.

Our team is an empowered tech counterpart for business units, responsible for the design and implementation of inventive data projects. We develop new analytics capabilities and improve Swiss Re's risk assessment capabilities.

Joining us, you will learn not only how insurance premiums are modelled and how data analytics can enrich business but also improve in stakeholders' management, agile development practices and tools used to drive impactful projects.

About You

We are looking for enthusiastic individuals who can be effective leaders with functional and operational expertise. You must be a good communicator who builds trust-based relationships within the squad and among partners.

If you possess traits and experience that match most of the below, we’d love to hear from you:

  • Good knowledge of software QA methodologies, tools and processes
  • Knowledge of the following tools and languages: TypeScript / JavaScript, Cypress / Playwright
  • Previous experience with software quality assurance
  • Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with orientation to detail
  • Ability to work with tight deadlines, prioritize and re-prioritize around changing organizational objectives and timelines
  • Exposure to agile development approaches (e.g. Scrum) and familiarity with tools like Azure DevOps, Confluence

Any of the below traits and experience are a major plus:

  • Hands-on experience with automated testing tools
  • Experience with performance and/or security testing
  • Experience in the Re-/Insurance industry

Role

For Slovakia the base salary range for this position is between EUR 2,800 and EUR 4,600 per month (for a full-time role). The specific salary offered considers:

  • the requirements, scope, complexity and responsibilities of the role,
  • the applicant’s own profile including education/qualifications, expertise, specialisation, skills and experience.

In addition to your base salary, Swiss Re offers an attractive performance-based variable compensation component, designed to recognise your achievements. Further you will enjoy a variety of global and location specific benefits.

Eligibility may vary depending on the terms of Swiss Re policies and your employment contract.

About Swiss Re

Swiss Re is one of the world’s leading providers of reinsurance, insurance and other forms of insurance-based risk transfer, working to make the world more resilient. We anticipate and manage a wide variety of risks, from natural catastrophes and climate change to cybercrime. Combining experience with creative thinking and cutting-edge expertise, we create new opportunities and solutions for our clients. This is possible thanks to the collaboration of more than 14,000 employees across the world.

Our success depends on our ability to build an inclusive culture encouraging fresh perspectives and innovative thinking. We embrace a workplace where everyone has equal opportunities to thrive and develop professionally regardless of their age, gender, race, ethnicity, gender identity and/or expression, sexual orientation, physical or mental ability, skillset, thought or other characteristics. In our inclusive and flexible environment everyone can bring their authentic selves to work and their passion for sustainability.

If you are an experienced professional returning to the workforce after a career break, we encourage you to apply for open positions that match your skills and experience.

We may use AI-powered tools to support the review and evaluation of applications for this position. These tools provide additional insights to our recruitment teams, but all hiring decisions are carefully reviewed and made by people. To learn more about how we use AI in recruitment and how we handle your personal data, please review our Data Privacy Statement before applying.

title: Internship, Research Engineer
description_html:
Rockwell Automation is a global technology leader focused on helping the world’s manufacturers be more productive, sustainable, and agile. With more than 28,000 employees who make the world better every day, we know we have something special. Behind our customers - amazing companies that help feed the world, provide life-saving medicine on a global scale, and focus on clean water and green mobility - our people are energized problem solvers that take pride in how the work we do changes the world for the better.

We welcome all makers, forward thinkers, and problem solvers who are looking for a place to do their best work. And if that’s you we would love to have you join us!

Job Description

Rockwell's Advanced Technology (AT) research team is looking for a research engineer for the internship program. This paid internship typically lasts 6 months, is typically combined with the study at a university, and is an opportunity to deep dive into the research environment in Rockwell. You will have the opportunity to participate in a research or research related project in the field related to industrial automation, such as software development, control engineering, functional/dynamic safety, system security, AI/ML, including preparing and evaluating research prototypes and writing a report. Each intern has a dedicated mentor to help navigate across Rockwell Automation and has agreed scope of the project that is discussed and presented at the end of the project. You will report to Research Team Manager.

Your Responsibilities

  • Work on a dedicated project in the Advanced Technology research group in Prague
  • Deliver defined milestones as a part of the research effort
  • Learn through practical experience and collaboration with the team

The Essentials - You Will Have

  • Software development skills (the programming language depends on the chosen area, the research prototypes are not bound by a particular language)
  • English language proficiency, at least for reading and writing reports/documentation.
  • Active student status. We welcome bright minds from different levels but prefer students during their master's last years or during a PhD program. Research oriented mind is more important.
  • Legal work and stay permits in the Czech Republic.

The Preferred - You Might Also Have

  • Engineering or research experience in the related area
  • Czech language proficiency

What We Offer

Our benefits package includes …

  • On-demand digital course library for professional development
  • and other local benefits!

At Rockwell Automation we are dedicated to building a diverse, inclusive and authentic workplace, so if you're excited about this role but your experience doesn't align perfectly with every qualification in the job description, we encourage you to apply anyway. You may be just the right person for this or other roles.

Rockwell Automation’s hybrid policy aligns that employees are expected to work at a Rockwell location at least Mondays, Tuesdays, and Thursdays unless they have a business obligation out of the office.

title: Junior SAP Consultant
description_html:

We connect the world of business with technologies from design to implementation. In Technology Consulting, you are not only a part of PwC, but you will also get the opportunity to get to know life in other companies. Usually, we are part of project teams responsible for the design and delivery of innovative and high-quality Business and Technology solutions for our clients in the Czech Republic and other European countries.

We are developing our skill sets not only when working with our clients but also in additional activities. We have six communities, where we learn about specific topics – Digital Strategy, Self-Mastery, Innovations & Start-up Development, AI, Data Management, SAP.

Roman Šťáhlavský leads our Technology Consulting team for the SAP area. He has been working in consulting since 1997 and has worked on many projects for both Czech and international clients. Are you a final year student or have you just graduated and looking for your first interesting work experience? Our benefits and fun

And various training within our technology communities.

PwC is the largest audit team in the Czech Republic, but also law, tax, consulting and technology, data or forensic teams. Find out how easy it is to combine this knowledge when you're in the right place. With us, you will get the opportunity to see how business is done in large companies. We are part of an international network of companies with more than 364,000 colleagues in 151 countries. At PwC, we create an inclusive work environment where everyone can be themselves and find their place and opportunity to develop. This year, we have successfully maintained the prestigious Equal Pay Certification, making us one of only four companies in the Czech Republic (and the only one from the Big 4) that demonstrably implements fair compensation practices regardless of gender.

title: Vývojář/ka simulačních modelů pro HVAC
description_html:
Jsme tým HVAC v Siemens Mobility a zabýváme se vývojem klimatizačních systémů pro kolejová vozidla. Přicházíme s inovativními produkty a řešeními pro regionální a vysokorychlostní vlaky. V tomto odvětví patříme k naprosté špičce a určujeme nové trendy. Nyní hledáme nového kolegu/kolegyni, který/á nám pomůže s tvorbou virtuálních modelů pro HVAC pro účely testování a validace. Přidejte se k nám!

Klíčové zodpovědnosti:

  • Vývoj a testování simulačních modelů a virtuálního testovacího prostředí pro HVAC systém kolejových vozidel (Matlab/Simulink)
  • Práce se specifikacemi a spolupráce se zahraničními dodavateli a týmy při vyjasňování požadavků a vyhodnocování výsledků
  • Tvorba vlastních algoritmů pro virtuální testování a validaci výsledků
  • Účast na SiL/HiL testech a podpora při systémových/typových zkouškách
  • Každodenní komunikace s kolegy a dodavateli ze zahraničí

Požadavky:

  • Technické vzdělání (strojní / elektrotechnické / energetika)
  • Znalosti v oblasti mechanické konstrukce, mechatroniky nebo elektrotechniky
  • Základní znalost termodynamiky (výhodou je zkušenost z oblasti klimatizačních systémů)
  • Zájem o vývoj a „kódování“– schopnost programovat a pracovat s technickým řešením v praxi
  • Zkušenost se simulačními nástroji (např. Matlab/Simulink)
  • Komunikační a koordinační dovednosti pro spolupráci napříč vývojovými a projektovými týmy
  • Angličtina na plynulé úrovni; znalost němčiny nebo dalšího jazyka je výhodou
  • Ochota příležitostně cestovat k dodavatelům

Na co se u nás můžete těšit:

  • Možnost spoluvytvářet nejmodernější vozidla pro celý svět – netvoříme „do šuplíku“
  • Odměnu za nástup ve výši 50.000 Kč
  • Systematickou podporu expertního rozvoje
  • Osobní roční rozpočet ve výši 34 000 Kč nebo 58 000 Kč (dle seniority pozice), který můžete využít v naší cafeterii v kategoriích „Moje zdraví“, „Moje pohoda“, „Moje finance“
  • Až 33 dní dovolené pro Váš odpočinek a regeneraci
  • Plně hrazené e-stravenky zaměstnavatelem ve výši 129,50,- Kč/den
  • Možnost pracovat z domova (s příspěvkem) pro lepší skloubení práce a osobního života
  • Flexibilní pracovní dobu (pevné jádro 10-14 hod.)
  • Firemní mateřskou školku (s příspěvkem zaměstnavatele) v blízkosti pracoviště v Praze a Ostravě
  • Možnost stát se akcionářem Siemens a získat akcie zdarma
  • Širokou nabídku vzdělávacích a rozvojových programů s důrazem na podporu expertního rozvoje
  • Možnost jazykových kurzů na pracovišti hrazených zaměstnavatelem
  • Ergonomické pracoviště pro vaše zdraví a pohodlí
  • Atraktivní slevy nebo zvýhodněné nabídky (slevy na automobil, bankovní produkty a další)
  • Asistenční program (osobnostní a psychologické poradenství) nejen pro vaši duševní pohodu

Pokud je Vám blízké téma udržitelné dopravy a moderních řešení s ní spojených, jste naším člověkem!

Siemens Mobility je již více než 160 let lídrem v oblasti udržitelných, spolehlivých a bezpečných dopravních řešení. V ČR máme globálně druhé největší vývojové centrum kolejových vozidel. Pracujeme na projektech do celého světa od definice požadavků, přes vývoj SW/HW a mechaniky, řešení průřezových témat, a to na úrovni celého vozidla.

Každý den ovlivňujeme životy statisíců cestujících. Naším plně automatizovaným metrem se můžete projet ve Vídni, vysokorychlostním vlakem pak např. na přímém spoji mezi Londýnem a Amsterdamem. S nejrychlejší lokomotivou světa Taurus se často můžete potkat i na české železnici. Zabýváme se ale i tématy jako je bateriový či vodíkový zdroj pohonu, či autonomní řízení.

Věříme, že náš úspěch spočívá v našich lidech - v týmu talentovaných a vášnivých profesionálů, kteří sdílí hodnoty a jsou motivováni společným cílem A co o nás konkrétně říkají naši zaměstnanci? Navštivte náš Atmoskop!

Nemáte připravené CV nebo Vám chybí více informací? Kontaktujte mě na jana.fatkova@siemens.com nebo na LinkedIn, kde sdílím více k aktuálnímu dění a projektům u nás. Ráda si Vás přidám do sítě kontaktů i pro případnou budoucí spolupráci!

Jsme zaměstnavatel podporující rovné příležitosti a vážíme si rozmanitosti. Zasazujeme se o rovné pracovní příležitosti bez ohledu na rasu, barvu pleti, původ, náboženství, pohlaví, sexuální orientaci, věk, občanství, rodinný stav, zdravotní postižení nebo genderovou identitu. Jsme odhodláni vytvořit tým, který bude reprezentovat nejrůznější prostředí, perspektivy a dovednosti.

title: Associate Software Test Engineer
description_html:
Information About The Position

Join Solar Turbines!

As an Associate Software Test Engineer, you will learn how to become a strong QA test automation engineer. You will need to possess analytical, communication, and time management skills, along with a willingness to learn. You will become part of the team responsible for functional and non-functional testing of Solar Turbines’ applications. You will be developing functional test cases and scripts to automate and optimize testing of applications.

What will be your tasks?

As an Associate Software Test Engineer, you will support the QA team in ensuring Solar Turbines’ applications meet high standards of quality, reliability, and performance. You will learn and improve testing fundamentals and build hands-on experience in both manual and automated testing across user interfaces (UI) and application programming interfaces (API) while collaborating closely with developers, analysts, and other stakeholders.

Your responsibilities will include:

  • Executing functional and non-functional tests (e.g., regression, smoke, integration) for internal and customer-facing applications
  • Analyzing requirements and user stories, asking clarifying questions, and identifying test conditions and risks
  • Designing, documenting, and maintaining clear test cases and test data for features and defect fixes
  • Learning how to create and enhance automated tests (scripts) to optimize testing and increase coverage
  • Validating application behavior across areas such as customer analytics, contract management, and turbine data computation/processing tools
  • Logging defects with clear reproduction steps, expected vs. actual results, and supporting evidence, re-testing fixes
  • Supporting test execution in CI/CD pipelines where applicable and helping keep test suites stable and maintainable
  • Collaborating with developers and the QA team to troubleshoot issues and continuously improve test processes
  • Actively participating in Agile ceremonies and contributing to team collaboration (planning, reviews, retrospectives, refinements)
  • Learning and applying quality practices, including test documentation, traceability, and good data handling principles in daily work

This role offers a strong opportunity to grow your QA skills, gain hands-on experience with test automation and modern testing practices, and contribute to reliable software used in real industrial environments.

Who are we looking for?

Basic qualifications:

  • Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Information Systems, or a related technical field (or equivalent practical experience)
  • 1–2 years of relevant experience (internship, student project, or commercial) in software testing / QA or software development
  • Basic knowledge of JavaScript/TypeScript and web application fundamentals (HTTP, REST APIs, browsers)
  • Hands-on experience (or strong willingness to learn) with test automation using Cypress and MochaJS (or similar testing frameworks)
  • Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines and running automated tests in pipelines (ideally in Azure DevOps)
  • Understanding of test design techniques (e.g., equivalence partitioning, boundary values) and ability to write clear test cases
  • Familiarity with defect reporting and test documentation (e.g., Azure DevOps Boards, Jira, or similar tools)
  • Knowledge of Git and basic software engineering practices (code reviews, branching, troubleshooting)
  • Good analytical, communication, and time management skills, with a proactive, learning-oriented mindset
  • Understanding of Agile / Scrum development methodology
  • You communicate in Slovak and English as well.

Top candidates will also have:

  • Experience with additional test automation patterns (Page Object Model), test data management, and writing maintainable test suites
  • Good understanding of software testing levels and types (unit, integration, system, security, regression, smoke, performance) and when to apply them
  • Experience testing REST APIs (e.g., Postman) and validating data in databases (basic SQL)
  • Familiarity with Azure DevOps beyond pipelines (Boards, Repos, Test Plans) or comparable ALM tooling
  • Basic experience with performance or reliability testing concepts (e.g., response times, stability, monitoring) and non-functional quality criteria
  • Ability to communicate clearly, ask the right questions, and accept feedback during test reviews and team discussions
  • Familiarity with secure coding/testing basics and data privacy principles when handling customer or operational data
  • Proactive mindset, adaptability, and willingness to work with complex domain topics in an industrial environment
  • Interest in continuous improvement and quality practices (root cause analysis, better test coverage)

Requirements For The Employee

Candidates with education suit the position

University education (Bachelor's degree)

Language Skills

English - Upper intermediate (B2)

Other Knowledge

TypeScript - Skillful

JavaScript - Skillful

Cypress - Skillful

Testing - Skillful

Advertiser

Brief Description Of The Company

Solar Digital as Customer Service group of Solar Turbines is the global organization responsible for InSight Platform technology and the relentless innovation of the entire ecosystem, capabilities, and customer user experience. Solar Digital is obsessively customer-centric with a passion for cutting edge technology. With deep expertise in cyber-security, machine data acquisition, software development, product knowledge, analytics, and regional teams around the world, it is dedicated to deliver digital solutions for Customer success.

Main Mission is to provide world-class secure digital solutions for asset lifecycle management to ensure our customers success. Solar Digital is building better, smarter world through technology partnerships with its customers. Highest priority is to satisfy the customer through early and continuous delivery of valuable software and services.

title: Intern - ASIC/FPGA Verification & Validation Engineer
description_html:
Job Description

As Intern - ASIC/FPGA Verification & Validation Engineer here at Honeywell in Brno, you will be part of a team working on new products that span from Urban Air Mobility through Military Mission Computer to Space design. This is a part-time opportunity for current university students with hybrid work from home model.

Honeywell Aerospace products and services are used on virtually every commercial, defense, and space aircraft. We build aircraft engines, cockpit and cabin electronics, wireless connectivity systems, mechanical components. Our hardware and software solutions help create more fuel-efficient aircraft, more direct and on-time flights, and safer skies.

Safer, More Fuel-Efficient Flying and Innovations for the Future of Aviation.

Responsibilities

  • ASIC/FPGA verification & validation for Safety/Mission critical digital systems for Avionics & Space applications per DO-254 standard
  • You will work with HDL languages (System Verilog, VHDL, Verilog) and following FPGA/SOC technologies: Microchip, AMD (XILINX), Intel, etc.
  • Engagement with full ASIC/FPGA development process (from requirement definition, to design, verification, synthesis, STA, CDC, including documentation)

Qualifications

  • Student currently enrolled in university program (preferably Master’s) in the field of Electrical Engineering, Computer Science or related
  • University experience with the ASIC/FPGA development & tools
  • Written, verbal and presentation skills that will support your ideas in English (B2 and above)
  • Analytical skills and results oriented individual, team player mindset

Please note that due to export restrictions, we will only be able to take into consideration applicants with an EU citizenship.

Our offer

  • Professional development plans & support from experienced team, regular feedback and mentorship opportunities
  • Comprehensive induction, ongoing training, and development to set you up for success, in-house and external learning platforms supporting development opportunities.
  • Flexible working arrangement to ensure seamless blend between work and studies.

We are an equal opportunity employer and value diversity at our company. We do not discriminate based on race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, or disability status.

We will ensure that individuals with disabilities are provided reasonable accommodation to participate in the job application or interview process, to perform crucial job functions, and to receive other benefits and privileges of employment. Please contact us to request accommodation.

Join us now and be part of a global team of thinkers, innovators, dreamers, and doers who make the things that make the future!

#TheFutureIsWhatWeMakeIt

#Futureshaper

About Us

Honeywell helps organizations solve the world's most complex challenges in automation, the future of aviation and energy transition. title: Security Engineer
description_html:
Job Introduction

FREQUENTIS Solutions & Services (FSS) as a member of the Austrian Group FREQUENTIS AG, is focused on software development, system engineering and delivery of safety-critical voice communication and information systems. Our solutions are developed and distributed in the following business segments: Air Traffic Management & Defence (civil and military air traffic control, aeronautical information management), Public Safety (police, fire and rescue services, emergency medical services) and Public Transport & Maritime (railway and urban transport solutions, vessel traffic management).

Your Role

In this position, you will actively contribute to the technical security strategy and ensure its implementation. As a Security Engineer in Air Traffic Management, you'll support the design and protection of critical aviation systems by helping assess risks, monitor threats, and ensure compliance with industry standards. You'll collaborate with engineering teams, contribute to incident response, and assist in deploying security tools and automation. This role offers hands-on experience in safeguarding complex infrastructures in a highly regulated and dynamic environment.

Join our team and help us make our solutions even more reliable. Work for an international technological leader and enjoy the benefits of flexible working arrangements and our focus on a good work-life balance.

Key Tasks

  • Conducting threat analyses and security risk assessments for customer facing solutions
  • Development of security services and tools for vulnerability detection, reporting and general security automation
  • Development of security concepts (security blueprints) for our products and projects and implementation of the technical measures and requirements
  • Supporting our development teams in evaluating, planning, and implementing security best practices
  • Planning, coordination and verification of security activities according to internal policies, regulations and industry best practices and creation of corresponding security documentation
  • Acting as the customer facing point of contact for security related topics

Key Qualifications

Technical Skills & Competencies

  • Basic understanding of the secure design of systems and software
  • Knowledge and experience with security governance process including vulnerability management, risk assessments, etc.
  • Experience with containerization and cluster management tools (e.g. Docker)
  • Experience with CI/CD tools
  • Experience in the network and infrastructure environment
  • Knowledge in the installation, configuration and administration of Linux systems
  • Experience in software development is an advantage
  • Cybersecurity certification is an advantage (eg. Security+, CASP+, SSCP, CISSP, CISM, GSE)
  • Network certification is an advantage (eg. CCNP, Network+, CCNA)

Personality Requirements & Skills

  • Flexible, self‑driven, goal‑oriented, and structured in your approach to work
  • Ability to follow corporate processes and standards
  • Willingness to travel occasionally to the customer site

Candidates with education suit the position

  • Secondary with school-leaving examination
  • University education (Bachelor's degree)
  • University education (Master's degree)

Educational Specialization

  • Information Technology
  • Telecommunications

Language Skills

  • English - Advanced (C1)

Our Values

Around 3,600 employees are committed to creating a safer world with their innovative strength and technology orientation. Our culture is based on a working environment characterized by fairness and trust, mutual respect and appreciation. As an international company, we value this diversity and recruit regardless of age, gender, origin, ethnicity, sexual orientation or religion. We value fair and good working conditions, an optimum work-life-balance and offer all our employees equal development opportunities. In doing so, we focus on long-term working relationships in order to keep the valuable know-how of our employees stable.

Benefits

We offer an international and exciting work environment with manifold opportunities to grow both personally and professionally. Happiness and commitment of our employees is a key contributor to our success and we therefore put strong emphasis on our team spirit and a healthy work-life-balance. We are located in a modern office building with good public transportation connections, close to the city center of Bratislava.
